description_long: This is a large, stylized semi-truck with a prominent cab-over-engine design, featuring a deep blue and red color scheme with flame decals along the hood and sides. The truck has a high, aerodynamic sleeper cab with silver exhaust stacks and side mirrors, and a robust chrome front grille. The chassis is equipped with three axles, two at the rear and one at the front, supporting six large wheels. The rear of the truck is a black chassis cab, designed for attaching a trailer, with no visible cargo bed or box. The windows are tinted dark, and the truck's bodywork is highly polished, giving it a glossy, metallic finish. The overall design is reminiscent of iconic American long-haul trucks, with exaggerated, almost heroic proportions.
description: A large, blue and red semi-truck with flame decals, chrome details, and a high sleeper cab. It features a black chassis cab rear and six wheels on three axles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the truck, flame decals, chrome exhaust stacks, and all three axles.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black chassis cab, dual rear axles, and the tall sleeper cab with silver stacks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible flame decals, chrome details, and the open rear chassis.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the chrome grille, flame decals on the hood, and the high cab roof with silver accents.
